# Pull Request

## Description

Describe the changes included in this pull request.

Example:

- Added documentation for repository workflow.
- Improved home page responsive layout.
- Fixed broken asset path.
- Added validation workflow.

---

## Type of change

Select the option that best describes this change:

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Visual/UI improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tooling/configuration
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] SEO improvement
- [ ] Accessibility improvement

---

## Why this change is needed

Explain the reason behind this change and the value it adds to the project.

---

## What was changed

List the main changes:

- 
- 
- 

---

## How it was tested

Describe how the change was tested locally.

Examples:

- [ ] Opened the website with Live Server.
- [ ] Checked desktop layout.
- [ ] Checked mobile layout.
- [ ] Verified links and navigation.
- [ ] Verified browser console has no visible errors.

---

## Screenshots

Add screenshots when the change affects UI, layout, branding or visual behavior.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated edits.
- [ ] The website was tested locally.
- [ ] The code follows the current project structure.
- [ ] The change does not break existing pages.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if needed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials or private data were added.
